creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
One more thing. I have found that sysutils/nut is not installing headers files - there new DEV knob. So I don't know howto check dependencies not only libups.so but also upsclient.h...

Or maybe it will be very simple check:
NUT_DEPENDS = upsclient.h:sysutils/nut

I will correct patch if it is needed.
